title: Computex event study
question: Do the chip names that headline or supply Computex beat the semis tape after the keynote?
finding: No robust alpha — abnormal vs SMH is statistically zero at every horizon (0 of 40 cells significant) and flips sign across robustness cuts (drop-2021 +1.2%, pre-2021 listings −2.4%); the median name beats SMH less than half the time. Own SMH, not the basket.
